name: HeidelbergCement India Limited
summary: HeidelbergCement India Limited manufactures and sells cement in India. It offers Portland pozzolana cement and Portland slag cement under the Mycem and Mycem Power brand. The company was formerly known as Mysore Cements Limited and changed its name to HeidelbergCement India Limited in April 2009. HeidelbergCement India Limited was incorporated in 1958 and is based in Gurugram, India. HeidelbergCement India Limited is a subsidiary of Cementrum I.B.V.
